rulings.Case Title: CAROL BLUMENFELD SACHAL VS. JUAN DE DIOS RODRIGUEZ-PINA BLANCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Referees Partition Accounting Report And Recommendation For Distribution Of Sale Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 25, 2017, Line 1. AMY HARRINGTON'S Motion To Approve Referees Partition Accounting Report And Recommendation For Distribution Of Sale Proceeds. Continued to November 28, 2017 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of its objection and reply no later than October 31, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NELLIE BERTUCCI ET AL VS. ANGELIQUE TAVARES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 13, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT JOHN BLAIOTTA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action 1, 3, 5, 7 for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action and to link the purported wrongful act committed by the moving Defendant with the damages alleged by Plaintiffs. All amendments in the Second Amended Complaint shall be in BOLD font. =(501/REQ)
